title: colysis christovalensis
parts: Colysis christovalensis has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and rhizomes. The roots of Colysis christovalensis are rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The leaves of this plant are a source of sesquiterpenes and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer activities. The rhizomes of Colysis christovalensis contain triterpenoids, which are valued for their potential in treating various cardiovascular and inflammatory diseases.
